subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Render thanks unto God that from the Dayspring of hopes the world-illumining rays have dawned forth, radiant and resplendent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان حمد کن خدا را که از مطلع آمال انوار جهانتاب طالع و لامع و از
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause
